tasks.title: SQLite migration: add rank REAL column + seed from created_at order
tasks.description: Add additive migration block in src/services/store.js. Guard with PRAGMA table_info. Add ALTER TABLE tasks ADD COLUMN rank REAL DEFAULT 0. Seed existing rows with rank = (row_number * 1000.0) ordered by created_at ASC within each (space_id, column) group. Update rowToTask to include rank field. Update SCHEMA_SQL comments.
acceptance_criteria: Running createStore on an existing DB adds rank column exactly once (idempotent migration)
Existing tasks get rank = 1000, 2000, 3000... based on created_at order within each space+column group
New DBs (from SCHEMA_SQL) get rank column via ALTER TABLE in migration block (IF NOT EXISTS guard on the table itself, migration block handles the column)
rowToTask returns rank as a number field
All existing store.test.js tests still pass

tasks.title: Store: new reorderTask method, update getTasksByColumn, insertTask, moveTask
tasks.description: Add reorderTask(spaceId, taskId, rank) method and maxRankInColumn + reorderTask prepared statements. Change getTasksByColumn ORDER BY to rank ASC, created_at ASC. Extend insertTask to assign rank = MAX(column_rank) + 1000 when not provided. Extend moveTask (rename old stmts.moveTask to stmts.moveTaskWithRank) to assign tail rank atomically in a transaction. Add the new store method to the returned factory object.
acceptance_criteria: store.reorderTask(spaceId, taskId, newRank) updates rank column and returns updated task
store.reorderTask returns null when task not found (no changes)
store.getTasksByColumn returns tasks ordered by rank ASC (ties broken by created_at ASC)
store.insertTask assigns rank = MAX(todo) + 1000 when task.rank is not provided
store.moveTask returns task with rank = MAX(destination) + 1000 (in a single transaction)
FTS triggers do NOT fire on reorderTask updates (the UPDATE statement only touches rank + updated_at, not title/description)
All existing store tests pass

tasks.title: Backend: PATCH /spaces/:spaceId/tasks/:taskId/rank endpoint
tasks.description: Add TASK_RANK_ROUTE regex, handleRankTask handler, and register PATCH route in src/handlers/tasks.js. Validation: rank required, must be finite number. Returns updated task with rank. Register the route BEFORE the TASK_SINGLE_ROUTE match to avoid regex shadowing. Add stderr event log on success (event: task.rank_updated).
acceptance_criteria: PATCH /spaces/:spaceId/tasks/:taskId/rank with { rank: 1500 } returns 200 + updated task
Returns 400 VALIDATION_ERROR when rank is missing
Returns 400 VALIDATION_ERROR when rank is not a finite number (Infinity, NaN, string)
Returns 404 TASK_NOT_FOUND when task does not exist in the space
Returns 500 on DB error
Emits event JSON to stderr on success
Route does NOT conflict with GET/PUT/DELETE /tasks/:taskId (regex is /tasks/:id/rank, matched before /tasks/:id)

tasks.title: Backend tests: rank.test.js covering store + endpoint
tasks.description: Create test/rank.test.js using the existing test patterns (see test/store.test.js and test/attachments.test.js for patterns). Test: migration seeding, reorderTask method, getTasksByColumn ordering, insertTask rank assignment, moveTask tail rank, PATCH /rank endpoint (happy path + errors).
acceptance_criteria: Migration test: existing tasks with rank=0 get correctly seeded ranks after migration
store.reorderTask test: returns updated task with correct rank
store.getTasksByColumn test: 3 tasks reordered via reorderTask come back in new rank order
store.insertTask test: new task gets rank = MAX(existing) + 1000
store.moveTask test: moved task gets rank = MAX(destination) + 1000
PATCH /rank test: 200 happy path
PATCH /rank test: 400 missing rank
PATCH /rank test: 400 NaN rank
PATCH /rank test: 404 unknown taskId
All tests pass with npm run test:report

tasks.title: Frontend: Task type + API client
tasks.description: Add rank?: number to Task interface in frontend/src/types/index.ts. Add reorderTask(spaceId, taskId, rank): Promise<Task> to frontend/src/api/client.ts using PATCH method.
acceptance_criteria: Task interface has rank?: number field
api.reorderTask sends PATCH /spaces/:spaceId/tasks/:taskId/rank with body { rank }
TypeScript compiles without errors (cd frontend && npx tsc --noEmit)

tasks.title: Frontend: extend useDragStore with card-level drag-over state
tasks.description: Add dragOverTaskId: string | null, insertBefore: boolean to DragState. Add setDragOverTask(taskId, insertBefore) action. Extend resetDrag to clear new fields. Initial values: dragOverTaskId=null, insertBefore=true.
acceptance_criteria: DragState interface includes dragOverTaskId and insertBefore
setDragOverTask updates both fields atomically
resetDrag clears dragOverTaskId to null
TypeScript compiles without errors

tasks.title: Frontend: useAppStore — reorderTask action with optimistic update
tasks.description: Add reorderTask(taskId: string, column: Column, newRank: number): Promise<void> to useAppStore. Snapshot tasks[column] before update. Optimistically reorder by setting task.rank=newRank and re-sorting by rank ASC, createdAt ASC. Call api.reorderTask. On error: restore snapshot, showToast. No loadBoard() on success.
acceptance_criteria: reorderTask immediately updates tasks[column] in Zustand store (no await before set)
Re-sorted array is ordered by rank ASC (ties by createdAt ASC)
On API error: tasks[column] reverts to pre-reorder state
On API error: showToast called with error message
No call to loadBoard() on success path
isMutating flag is NOT set (reorder is non-blocking / optimistic only)

tasks.title: Frontend: Board.tsx — computeDropRank utility + handleDrop same-column reorder
tasks.description: Add computeDropRank(tasks, draggedId, overTaskId, insertBefore) utility function in Board.tsx. Extend handleDrop: when dragSourceColumn === targetColumn, compute new rank and call reorderTask (or trigger batch rebalance if gap < 0.001). Add handleDragOverTask callback that calls useDragStore.getState().setDragOverTask(...). Read reorderTask from useAppStore. Pass onDragOverTask={handleDragOverTask} to each Column.
acceptance_criteria: computeDropRank returns midpoint rank for standard insertion
computeDropRank returns needsRebalance=true when gap < 0.001, with rebalancedTasks array assigning [1000, 2000, ...]
handleDrop with same column calls reorderTask (single call) or batch reorderTask for all tasks in rebalancedTasks
handleDrop with different column still calls existing moveTask logic
handleDragOverTask calls setDragOverTask with correct taskId and insertBefore
Column receives onDragOverTask prop and passes it to TaskCard

tasks.title: Frontend: TaskCard.tsx — drag handle icon + drop indicator + card-level onDragOver
tasks.description: Add onDragOverTask?: (taskId: string, insertBefore: boolean) => void prop. Add handleDragOver: compute insertBefore from mouse Y vs. card bounding box, call onDragOverTask. Skip if draggedTaskId === task.id (no self-drop indicator). Add drag_indicator icon (Material Symbol) in top-left, opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100. Add conditional border-t-2 / border-b-2 border-primary classes when isDragOverThis. Subscribe to useDragStore for isDragOverThis + insertBeforeThis with per-card boolean selectors.
acceptance_criteria: Drag handle icon (drag_indicator) appears on card hover (CSS group-hover)
Dragging over top half of a card shows border-t-2 border-primary on that card
Dragging over bottom half of a card shows border-b-2 border-primary on that card
No indicator shown when hovering over the dragged card itself
handleDragOver calls e.preventDefault() and e.stopPropagation()
Subscribes with per-card boolean selectors (no full-store re-render)
Drop indicator clears when drag ends (resetDrag clears dragOverTaskId)

tasks.title: Frontend: Column.tsx — add onDragOverTask prop, forward to TaskCard
tasks.description: Add onDragOverTask?: (taskId: string, insertBefore: boolean) => void to ColumnProps. Pass onDragOverTask prop through to each TaskCard. No other logic changes.
acceptance_criteria: ColumnProps includes onDragOverTask
Each TaskCard receives onDragOverTask
TypeScript compiles without errors
Existing drag-over-column behavior unchanged (column-level isDragOver selector still works)

tasks.title: E2E + integration tests: drag-to-reorder
tasks.description: QA stage: Playwright E2E tests covering the full reorder flow. Backend integration tests for rank ordering. Tests must use mcp__playwright__* tools. Run against the built app on localhost:3000.
acceptance_criteria: E2E: drag card A above card B in todo column → after reload, A appears before B
E2E: drag card A to bottom of todo → after reload, A is last
E2E: drag card from todo to in-progress → card appears at bottom of in-progress, persists after reload
E2E: drag handle icon is visible on card hover (Playwright hover + screenshot)
E2E: drop indicator top border appears when hovering top half of a card during drag
Backend: GET /tasks returns todo tasks in rank order (not creation order) after reorder
Backend: PATCH /rank returns 200 and updated rank value
